features: 【Comprehensive Power Strip】The extension lead 5m with 4 way sockets and 3 USB, 2 x 3-Pin outlet and 2 x 2-Pin outlet, can safely charge up to 7 devices at the same time The maximum power is 3250W (13A/3250W Max).
【Extension Cable 5M】The cross-sectional area of the extender cable is increased to 1.25mm². Higher current capacity, improved conductivity, lower energy loss and enhanced safety.
【Wall Mountable Extension Lead】Both ends of the power strip feature a screw-mounting design, allowing them to be securely fixed to walls, tables, and other surfaces.
【Compact Design】7-in-1 Extension cord has a MINI size(5.59in*2.71in*1.46in). It is conducive to your hiding it in the narrow corners of your home, and it is also convenient to carry.

【Safety Design】It can be controlled by an overload switch. The plug of the plug extender is equipped with a 13A fuse, which complies with the BS1363/A standard. There is a child-protection safety door and 750°C flame-retardant material.
description: Product Description Extension Lead with USB Four-Layer Safety Protection Starting from the "Core" Pure Copper Core Three 1.25mm² copper conductors enable superior current transmission with minimal energy loss, ensuring greater efficiency and safety. Fused Plug A fused plug prevents overheating and fire risks by cutting power in the event of excessive current. Flame Retardant Material Fireproof PC shell withstands 1382℉—lasts longer, tougher than ever. Child Safety Sockets The safety shutter design helps prevent electric shock, protecting children and pets.
